# Current capability status

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-capability-status.py; edit capabilities.yaml instead. -->

This table uses the strict vocabulary defined in `capabilities.yaml`. Repository evidence proves code or disposable integration behaviour; it does not substitute for deployment, assessment, or approval evidence.

| Capability | Status | Repository evidence | Remaining gaps | Owner |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Transactional outbox | Implemented prototype | [`PostgresOutboxStore.java`](../../services/event-core/src/main/java/com/voicesecure/events/PostgresOutboxStore.java), [`TransactionalOutboxRelay.java`](../../services/event-core/src/main/java/com/voicesecure/events/TransactionalOutboxRelay.java), [`OutboxRetryPolicy.java`](../../services/event-core/src/main/java/com/voicesecure/events/OutboxRetryPolicy.java), [`V005__transactional_outbox.sql`](../../services/payment-service/src/main/resources/db/migration/V005__transactional_outbox.sql), [`TransactionalOutboxRelayTests.java`](../../services/event-core/src/test/java/com/voicesecure/events/TransactionalOutboxRelayTests.java), [`PaymentProductionSchemaTests.java`](../../services/payment-service/src/test/java/com/voicesecure/payments/PaymentProductionSchemaTests.java) | Combined PostgreSQL/Redpanda crash-window injection, downstream effectively-once proof, relay metrics, and managed Kafka evidence. | payments-platform |
| API rate limiting | Implemented prototype | [`RateLimitDecision.java`](../../services/api-adapter-service/src/main/java/com/voicesecure/api/RateLimitDecision.java), [`InMemoryApiRateLimiter.java`](../../services/api-adapter-service/src/main/java/com/voicesecure/api/InMemoryApiRateLimiter.java), [`InMemoryApiRateLimiterTests.java`](../../services/api-adapter-service/src/test/java/com/voicesecure/api/InMemoryApiRateLimiterTests.java) | Redis-backed shared enforcement, risk policies, failure policy, metrics, and multi-instance integration tests. | api-platform |
| Production HTTP composition root | Not started | [`ApiApplication.java`](../../services/api-adapter-service/src/main/java/com/voicesecure/api/ApiApplication.java) | The main HTTP process still uses in-memory financial repositories and refuses production startup. | api-platform |
| Voice verification | Stubbed / trust boundary | [`__init__.py`](../../services/voice-service/src/voice_service/__init__.py), [`test_voice_service.py`](../../services/voice-service/tests/test_voice_service.py) | Durable voice data, real mobile capture/upload, independent biometric and spoof evaluation, and named approval. | voice-security |
| Mobile voice capture and upload | Not started | [`voiceSecureApiClient.ts`](../../apps/mobile/src/api/voiceSecureApiClient.ts) | Microphone permission, recording, cancellation, challenge-bound upload, and retry UX. | mobile |
| Durable voice persistence | Not started | [`__init__.py`](../../services/voice-service/src/voice_service/__init__.py) | PostgreSQL templates, challenges, replay fingerprints, consent, retention, revocation, and audit metadata. | voice-security |
| AWS infrastructure | Implemented prototype | [`main.tf`](../../infra/aws/environments/demo/main.tf), [`main.tf`](../../infra/aws/environments/production-reference/main.tf), [`TerraformAwsBaselineTests.java`](../../services/ops-service/src/test/java/com/voicesecure/ops/TerraformAwsBaselineTests.java) | No live apply, managed-service integration evidence, soak history, teardown report, or DR drill. | platform |
| Production readiness | Not started | [`release-runbook.md`](../../docs/release-runbook.md) | Production composition, live SLOs, DR, penetration test, compliance assessment, biometric evaluation, and signed release evidence. | release-owners |

Terms such as production, durable, ready, implemented, or validated describe a scoped target unless the registry status and linked evidence prove that maturity level.
